result:
**Goal: Add a 3D perspective renderer that displays the Game of Life grid as an isometric landscape, where living cells rise as columns whose height reflects cell age.**

This would render the grid as a pseudo-3D isometric view in the terminal using Unicode block/shade characters, with older cells appearing as taller pillars and younger cells as short bumps — creating a cityscape-like visualization that evolves over time. It fits naturally as a new display mode (toggled with a key) alongside the existing heatmap and zoom modes, and stays true to the project's pure-Python, no-dependencies philosophy.
